message.content:
Of course, I'd be happy to help with a candid and detailed breakdown of your startup pitch. Please provide the text of your current pitch so I can review it. Once I have it, I'll analyze it, point out both the strengths and weaknesses, and offer a suggestion to make it more memorable.

If you're not ready to share the full text, you can also describe key points or the overall structure of your pitch, and I can give you guidance based on that information.
